title: Fit Test - Tab is present and accessible in Device Settings
scenario: Fit Test tab is present and accessible in Device Settings for Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Connect a supported device (Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20) to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Verify that the Fit Test tab is present in Device Settings.
expected: 1. Fit Test tab is present in Device Settings for supported devices (Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 20).\n2. Tapping the Fit Test tab opens the Fit Test screen.
